task_updates.executor_notes: Added the five targeted regression modules covering payment authorization actor-set membership across grants/admin_chat plus null-recipient and unknown-producer failures, tx signature history append behavior across confirm/requeue cycles using a real `DatabaseHandler` method stack backed by an in-memory fake Supabase table, `safe_delete_messages` error handling including 429 retry and `channel=None`, split-cog restart-safety plus `_bind_cap_breach_dm` routing to `PaymentWorkerCog`, and terminal cleanup wiring for populated and empty cleanup-message lists. Verified with `python -m py_compile` for the new files, `python -m pytest tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_tx_signature_history.py tests/test_safe_delete_messages.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_terminal_cleanup_wiring.py -q`, and a full `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` run (`89 passed, 2 warnings`).
commands_run: python -m py_compile tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_tx_signature_history.py tests/test_safe_delete_messages.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_terminal_cleanup_wiring.py
python -m pytest tests/test_payment_authorization.py tests/test_tx_signature_history.py tests/test_safe_delete_messages.py tests/test_payment_cog_split.py tests/test_terminal_cleanup_wiring.py -q

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the five new modules together cover grants/admin_chat authorization set-membership, null-recipient rejection, unknown-producer warning failure, tx-signature history across repeated requeues, safe-delete error branches, persistent-view re-registration, `_bind_cap_breach_dm` routing to `PaymentWorkerCog`, and terminal cleanup with both populated and empty cleanup-message lists.
